## Description

<!-- Describe the change and what it accomplishes. Link to the related issue if applicable. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / performance

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests cover the new/changed behaviour.
- [ ] `pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] Changeset is included (`pnpm changeset`) if user-facing.
- [ ] JSDoc updated for exported APIs if needed.
